description: Style NoteStay cool and stylish this summer in this nike T-shirt with Dri-Fit technology. Team this with training pants and training shoes for complete benefit during your Sports sessions or simply wear it with jeans and sports shoes and flaunt your sporty attitude.Product DetailsDeep royal blue T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chest and branding on the left sleeveMaterial and Care60% cotton 40% polyesterMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on print/decoration
